video:video.video:title: Genius Gems Excursion Highlights
video:video.video:description: Highlights from a recent excursion with children from Genius Gems Childcare Centre, a bilingual preschool in Changi, Singapore.

image:image.image:title: Genius Gems excursion video thumbnail
image:image.image:caption: Children on an excursion with Genius Gems Childcare Centre, Changi

image:image.image:title: Happy children learning and playing at Genius Gems Childcare Centre in Changi, Singapore
image:image.image:caption: Bilingual childcare and preschool in Changi, Singapore

image:image.image:title: Blossom curriculum framework at Genius Gems Childcare Centre
image:image.image:caption: ECDA-aligned early childhood curriculum in Singapore

image:image.image:title: Genius Gems Childcare Centre logo
Child joyfully playing with bubbles at Genius Gems Childcare Centre
image:image.image:caption: Hands-on play-based learning at Genius Gems in Changi, Singapore

image:image.image:title: Two children sharing and playing with letter puzzle pieces at Genius Gems
image:image.image:caption: Collaborative play and early literacy at Genius Gems Childcare Centre

image:image.image:title: Qualified teacher guiding a child during a learning activity at Genius Gems
image:image.image:caption: Personalised teaching at Genius Gems, privately run childcare centre in Singapore

image:image.image:title: Teacher in a circle with children during a group activity at Genius Gems
image:image.image:caption: Small class sizes and personal attention at Genius Gems Childcare Centre, Changi

image:image.image:title: Teacher and children playing with letter puzzles at Genius Gems
image:image.image:caption: Learning through play at Genius Gems Childcare Centre in Changi, Singapore

image:image.image:title: Child playing with colourful rings during a hands-on activity at Genius Gems
image:image.image:caption: Character development and experiential learning at Genius Gems

image:image.image:title: Children at Genius Gems holding colourful gems during character development
image:image.image:caption: Character development programme at Genius Gems Childcare Centre

image:image.image:title: Ms Nicole Ang, Director of Genius Gems Childcare Centre
Ms Sharifah, Principal of Genius Gems Childcare Centre
Genius Gems Childcare Centre school uniform
image:image.image:caption: Comfortable school uniform for children at Genius Gems in Changi

image:image.image:title: Child wearing the Genius Gems school uniform with comfort and cheer
image:image.image:caption: Free uniform included with new enrolment at Genius Gems Childcare Centre

image:image.image:title: Teacher in a circle with children during a group activity at Genius Gems
Teacher guiding Kindergarten 2 (K2) children during a classroom lesson at Genius Gems
image:image.image:caption: K2 classroom learning at Genius Gems Childcare Centre, Changi, Singapore

image:image.image:title: Children at Genius Gems holding colourful gems during character development
Child joyfully playing with bubbles at Genius Gems
Teacher and children playing with letter puzzles at Genius Gems
Two children sharing letter puzzle pieces at Genius Gems
Child playing with colourful rings at Genius Gems
Playgroup children engaged in hands-on early learning at Genius Gems Childcare Centre
image:image.image:caption: Playgroup programme at Genius Gems in Changi, Singapore — early bilingual learning from age 18 months

image:image.image:title: Children dancing during a performing arts session at Genius Gems
image:image.image:caption: Performing arts and creative movement at Genius Gems Childcare Centre, Changi

image:image.image:title: Children enjoying water play at Genius Gems Childcare Centre
image:image.image:caption: Sensory water play activity at Genius Gems in Changi, Singapore

image:image.image:title: Child concentrating during a water play session at Genius Gems
image:image.image:caption: Hands-on sensory water activity at Genius Gems Childcare Centre

image:image.image:title: Children sharing a water play table at Genius Gems
image:image.image:caption: Collaborative water play at Genius Gems Childcare Centre, Changi

image:image.image:title: Sensory water play exploration at Genius Gems Childcare Centre
image:image.image:caption: Children discovering through water play at Genius Gems, Singapore
